log_bucket_encryption.description: SSE algorithm applied to the log bucket (SC-28).

log_bucket_name.description: Name of the log bucket receiving access logs.

log_bucket_public_access_block.description: Public access block configuration for the log bucket (AC-3).

primary_bucket_encryption.description: SSE algorithm applied to the primary bucket (SC-28).

primary_bucket_name.description: Name of the primary data bucket.

primary_bucket_public_access_block.description: Public access block configuration for the primary bucket (AC-3).

primary_bucket_versioning.description: Versioning status of the primary bucket (CM-6).

environment.description: Deployment environment (e.g., dev, test, prod, sandbox).

project_name.description: Name of the project used for tagging and bucket naming.

region.description: AWS region where resources will be deployed.
